title: FabricationReleaseReadinessInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for final fabrication release-readiness workers that aggregate CAD conversion, assembly decomposition, generated or imported instructions, reviews, learning outcomes, machine gates, human interventions, and evidence before machine-ready release.

FabricationReleaseEvidenceRef.title: FabricationReleaseEvidenceRef
FabricationReleaseEvidenceRef.description: Evidence retained from a source artifact, worker result, operator action, inspection, simulation, machine observation, or learning outcome.

evidenceId.description: Stable evidence id used by gates, blockers, interventions, decisions, and release artifacts.

evidenceKind.description: Evidence kind such as cad-conversion-result, assembly-plan-result, instruction-generation-result, instruction-review-result, learning-outcome-result, machine-observation, operator-proof, inspection-report, setup-sheet, simulation, material-conditioning, or datum-transfer.

sourceRefId.description: Source request, result, artifact, operation, part, machine, or boundary id when available.

uri.description: Sanitized evidence URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the retained evidence artifact when available.

status.description: Evidence status such as satisfied, pending, missing, rejected, superseded, stale, warning-only, or review-required.

labels.description: Compact labels such as workholding-verified, temp-wait-satisfied, assembly-plan-selected, operator-proof, inspection-pending, or learning-boundary-retained.

FabricationReleaseMachineGate.title: FabricationReleaseMachineGate
FabricationReleaseMachineGate.description: One machine, process, station, assembly, inspection, or operator gate that must be satisfied before release.

machineId.description: Machine or station id when the gate is machine-specific.

machineClass.description: Machine or process class such as additive-fdm, additive-resin, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, postprocess-station, inspection, assembly, or operator.

gateKind.description: Gate kind such as thermal-state, material-state, workholding, datum, toolpath, cutter-compensation, spindle-state, support-media, instruction-review, assembly-fit, learning-outcome, or operator-approval.

status.description: Gate status such as satisfied, pending, blocked, warning, not-applicable, or human-review-required.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence ids or labels required to clear this gate.

satisfiedEvidence.description: Evidence ids already satisfying this gate.

message.description: Short non-secret gate summary for operator review.

FabricationReleaseHumanIntervention.title: FabricationReleaseHumanIntervention
FabricationReleaseHumanIntervention.description: Human setup, handoff, verification, measurement, approval, assembly, recovery, or inspection required before release.

interventionKind.description: Intervention kind such as workholding-confirmation, datum-transfer, material-conditioning, filament-change-purge, tool-change-approval, assembly-fit-check, partoff-support, inspection-approval, or release-signoff.

description.description: Human-readable intervention summary safe for logs and operator screens.

required.description: True when machine-ready release must wait for this intervention.

status.description: Intervention status such as pending, satisfied, blocked, waived, rejected, or not-applicable.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this intervention when known.

partId.description: Part or subassembly id associated with this intervention when known.

evidenceRequired.description: Evidence ids or labels required from the operator, inspector, setup sheet, or machine before this intervention is cleared.

FabricationReleaseBlocker.title: FabricationReleaseBlocker
FabricationReleaseBlocker.description: A retained blocker that prevents or constrains machine-ready release.

code.description: Stable blocker code such as workholding-release-required, datum-transfer-required, material-conditioning-required, instruction-review-blocker, machine-support-required, human-intervention-required, or learning-boundary-retained.

message.description: Human-readable blocker summary safe for logs.

severity.description: Severity such as blocker, high, medium, low, warning, or info.

machineReadyImpact.description: Effect on release posture, e.g. blocks-machine-ready, needs-human-release, warning-only, release-with-conditions, or learning-only.

evidenceRequired.description: Evidence ids or labels required to clear this blocker.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this blocker when known.

partId.description: Part or subassembly id associated with this blocker when known.

machineId.description: Machine or station id associated with this blocker when known.

FabricationReleaseManifestArtifact.title: FabricationReleaseManifestArtifact
FabricationReleaseManifestArtifact.description: Artifact retained in the final release manifest or requested for release review.

artifactKind.description: Artifact kind such as gcode, nc-program, slicer-project, setup-sheet, inspection-plan, simulation-report, release-manifest, operator-instruction, assembly-plan, learning-summary, or machine-log.

sourceRefId.description: Source worker result, instruction target, submitted program, or evidence id when available.

uri.description: Sanitized retained artifact URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the artifact when available.

machineId.description: Machine id this artifact is intended for when applicable.

format.description: Artifact format such as GCODE, NC, 3MF, STEP, DXF, PDF, JSON, MD, or TXT.

releaseRole.description: Release role such as machine-program, setup-sheet, operator-proof, inspection-plan, assembly-guide, blocked-evidence, warning-evidence, or release-summary.

evidence.description: Evidence ids or labels attached to this artifact.

FabricationReleaseDecision.title: FabricationReleaseDecision
FabricationReleaseDecision.description: One release decision for a job, plan, part, operation, machine, process group, or artifact set.

scope.description: Decision scope such as job, plan, part, operation, machine, artifact, assembly, postprocess, inspection, or learning.

machineReady.description: True only when this decision scope can be released to the machine or next process without retained blockers.

releaseStatus.description: Release status such as approved, blocked, conditional, needs-human-review, warning, superseded, or rejected.

approvedBy.description: Operator, service, policy, or approver id when this decision is approved.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO-like expiration timestamp for time-bound evidence or release approvals.

blockers.description: Blocker ids or labels retained against this decision.

FabricationReleaseReadinessRequest.title: FabricationReleaseReadinessRequest
FabricationReleaseReadinessRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.release.readiness.requests for final release-readiness workers.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.release-readiness.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this release-readiness job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id being considered for release.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.release.readiness.results.

candidatePlanId.description: Selected assembly, process, or hybrid plan candidate under release review.

releaseScope.description: Requested release scope such as job, selected-plan, part-set, machine-batch, operation-batch, inspection-handoff, or assembly-handoff.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence available to the release-readiness worker.

machineGates.description: Machine, process, assembly, inspection, and operator gates to evaluate.

humanInterventions.description: Required or optional human interventions already known to the planner.

requestedArtifacts.description: Artifacts being considered for release or final manifest retention.

knownBlockers.description: Planner-known blockers that the release-readiness worker must retain, clear, or convert to conditions.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent release review work.

notes.description: Non-secret release-readiness notes for the worker.

FabricationReleaseReadinessResult.title: FabricationReleaseReadinessResult
FabricationReleaseReadinessResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.release.readiness.results with final machine-ready decisions, release manifest artifacts, retained blockers, and human-intervention requirements.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.release-readiness.result.v1.

requestId.description: Release-readiness request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original release-readiness request.

jobId.description: Optional persisted fabrication job id from the original request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

releaseGate.description: Release gate, policy, model, or adapter used.

releaseGateVersion.description: Release gate or policy version used for repeatability and audit.

success.description: True when the worker completed its requested release-readiness evaluation.

machineReady.description: True only when all release decisions are machine-ready or explicitly approved with no retained machine-ready blockers.

decisions.description: Release decisions by job, plan, part, operation, machine, artifact, assembly, inspection, or learning scope.

humanInterventions.description: Required or retained human interventions after evaluation.

warnings.description: Non-blocking release warnings that should be retained with the manifest.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as policy confidence, evaluated gate ids, signed evidence ids, release manifest id, or learning boundary summaries.
